title: Chapter 13
content:
Chapter 13: Chapter 13: Incubus Lord

Time passed as Damon and Ariel panting from exhaustion. Ariel’s sweaty body fell backwards, her head resting on Damon’s chest.

[Sea Princess Bloodline was successfully integrated into Ariel Aquaria.]

[Sea Princess Physique was successfully integrated into Ariel Aquaria.]

[Ariel’s Water Spiritual Roots have been upgraded from Mortal Grade - Mid → Mortal Grade - Peak.]

[Due to Sea Princess Bloodline and Physique, Ariel’s Water Spiritual Roots change into Sea Spiritual Roots.]

’It changes? Let’s see it later for now...’

Giving a tired grunt, Damon bought a recovery pill, placing it in Ariel’s mouth.

"Get some rest." He spoke, hugging her tightly before looking at her information.

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Fourth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 420/1000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon Arcknight]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Water: 40, Spear: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Sea Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Sensitive Body, Graceful, Young Lady, Kind, Loyal, Lustful, Naive]

"Hmm~" A soft moan escaped Ariel’s mouth as her blue eyes slowly open and gazing around her with a dazed expression.

Something was different. Her senses felt far keener than before, her Qi reserves seemed to have nearly doubled, and her meridians felt noticeably broader...

’What did Damon do to make her to have such a transformation?’

"A... bloodline?" The thought pop out inside her mind as she examined her own body. Her eyes widened as she looked back at Damon with stunned look.

Bloodlines were among the rarest phenomena across the Eastern Continent. Even spanning its entirety, only a handful of individuals were known to possess one.

A bloodline alone was sufficient to all but guarantee that its bearer would ascend to at least the Emperor Spirit Realm, even one of lesser quality.

Yet it not only a bloodline — she could feel her affinities and her body getting stronger than before. Her skin felt more supple, more flawless than ever before.

’A bloodline, a physique, and upgraded spiritual roots all at once...?’

Her lips slight open, but she held herself back because of the promise she had made earlier.

Her heath was in pain from the situation, but she knows that it had cost him something to do this to her. Even though she doesn’t know how Damon does something like this.

From the depths of her heart, she now believed she had found the right person to love.

What mattered was that her talent had risen to heights she could never have dreamed of, and it was all because of one man.

A radiant smile spread across her face as she flung herself into Damon’s embrace.

"Damon, you are the best!" She locked her legs around his waist and pressed a passionate kiss to his lips, her voice shedding every trace of its graceful, refined quality and taking on something far sultrier and inviting.

Her heart swelled as she pulled Damon’s head against her chest, intent on smothering him in her affection then and there.

"Are you sure you want to do this? Once we start, it will be until morning, and tomorrow is the selection, you know." Damon smiled, letting his hands fall heavily on her buttocks.

"You, right, I still need to prepare." Realizing that, she then grabbed her clothes and began to prepare to start cultivating.

"Try cultivating using Yin-Yang Harem Scripture. It’s a dual cultivation." Damon told her.

Then she started to sit cross-legged and close her eyes. Following the scripture, she started to absorb and refine the yang qi inside her womb.

Damon could see her aura getting stronger by the minute. Then he asks.

’System, with the scripture and my yang qi working together, how far will she advance?’

[She will reach the Eighth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm once all the yang qi within her has been refined.]

’That quickly?’

[Yes. Your yang qi is exceptional. Because you possess the Incubus bloodline and physique, the benefit to women far exceeds any gain to yourself.]

’What do you mean by that?’

[The Incubus is a long-lost species — the counterpart to the succubus. The succubus is known for its insatiable hunger and its ability to drain energy from men. The Incubus is its opposite in every sense. It stirs that same hunger within women and pours its energy into them rather than taking.]

’So, where a succubus hunts men and suck them dry without a second thought, while an Incubus draws women in and makes them stronger.’

[Correct, Host. This is precisely why the Incubus was driven to extinction. Men who found their women claimed by Incubus would stop at nothing to destroy them. A woman who had sex with an Incubus cannot be satisfied by any other.]

’I can already picture how that played out.’

"Now, I can make any woman that I like stronger, so I don’t have to worry about their talent," he murmurs to himself.

Then, without warning, a surge of aura erupted from Ariel. She broke through to the Fifth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm. Watching her advance, a thought settled in Damon’s mind.

’I need to grow stronger as well.’

He opened the lust store and began browsing for a movement technique, and one entry immediately caught his eye.

[Astral Steps]

[Description: The Astral Steps is a Long-Lost Movement Technique, and it consists of eight levels of movement techniques, each stronger and faster than the next. Each grade will unlock the next level.]

[Normal Grade] [Upgradable with Lust Point]

[Price: 2500]

It’s expensive for Normal grade, it’s the same price as Earth Grade Technique, but since in upgradable, I don’t need to look for other movement techniques.

’System, purchase the Astral Steps.’

[You bought Astral Steps. -2500 lust points.]

The technique poured into his mind as it always did, though he would still need to test it properly.

He checked his remaining lust point. 3,995 Lust Points. After a moment’s thought and calculation.

’System, upgrade my spiritual root to peak and rise my cultivation to the Eighth Level of the Elementary Spirit Realm.’
